# Arktera Systems

> Arktera Systems helps service businesses (trades & home services, professional
> services, health & wellness, financial services, real estate) improve visibility,
> strengthen conversion performance, and build more reliable lead generation systems.
> We work across three connected areas: local/organic search visibility, website
> conversion architecture and trust signals, and lead flow automation (capture,
> qualify, nurture).

Two ways to engage with us:
- Contact (/pages/contact.html): a short, direct message form for people who already
  know what they want to ask.
- Business Growth Assessment (/pages/assessment.html): our primary structured intake
  — a 5-step questionnaire (business info, overview, current challenges, goals,
  review) used to diagnose visibility, conversion, and lead flow gaps before an
  engagement begins.

## Key pages

- [Home](/index.html): overview of the visibility → conversion → lead flow system.
- [Services](/pages/services.html): the three core service areas, plus FAQ.
- [Get Found](/pages/get-found.html): local/organic search visibility service.
- [Convert](/pages/convert.html): website conversion architecture service.
- [Automate](/pages/automate.html): lead flow automation service.
- [About](/pages/about.html): company philosophy and approach.
- [Breakdowns](/pages/breakdowns.html): in-depth diagnostic case studies of real
  service-business websites and Google Business Profiles.
- [Insights](/pages/insights.html): articles on local SEO, conversion rate
  optimization, and lead nurture for service businesses.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Statistics cited in case studies (e.g. lead volume or visibility percentage
  increases) describe specific client outcomes, not guaranteed or typical results.
- "Arktera Systems" is the current and only correct brand name for this business.
